title: Sideranthus rubiginosus
intro: Sideranthus rubiginosus, also known as Red Dust Flower or Red-cushion Sideranthus, is a small, annual plant native to Australia, characterized by its delicate, pink to red flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Sideranthus rubiginosus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
